title: 天皇賞（秋）の後に・先に続くこの道よ

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
(I hate to admit defeat... but the competition
today was unbelievable!)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text: (I've still got a lot of flaws to make up for.)

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
...Hehe. Good thing I did this race before the
Tokyo Daishoten!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Now I know there's still a ways to go till I reach
my full potential!

text_block_list.name: Inari One
text_block_list.text:
Time to pick myself up and keep improvin'! I'm
comin' for ya, Oi Racecourse!
